session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**make fast-ci failed** with exit code 2 due to **Prettier formatting issues**.
### Detailed Breakdown
**Prettier Check FAILED:** - Code style issues found in 3 files - Run Prettier with `--write` to fix
**All Other Checks PASSED:** - Linting: All checks passed - Format check: 1673 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5953 passed in 22.52s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.32s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.81s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed
The warnings shown at the start indicate which files have style issues: 1. `docs/learned/commands/system-folder-convention.md` 2. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 3. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These three files need Prettier formatting to pass the full CI.
